title: Flash-Loan Arbitrage with the Hot Potato
summary: Borrow DEEP from a DeepBook pool with no collateral and repay it in the same transaction. Write the Move module that consumes the FlashLoan hot-potato via pool::return_flashloan_base, assemble the borrow-use-return PTB in TypeScript, publish the package to the sandbox, and prove the loan is risk-free — short repayment reverts the entire transaction.
